title: Racosperma microbotryum
taxonomy: Racosperma microbotryum is classified under the family Fabaceae and the genus Racosperma. It is also known as Acacia microbotryum and is a species of flowering plant. The species is native to Australia, and its classification is further divided into the subfamily Mimosoideae. The plant is known to produce yellow flowers and is often found in dry woodlands. Racosperma microbotryum is a part of the legume family and is closely related to other Acacia species.
